_comment: Full reference of available env knobs. NONE are required: the browser-extension relay is the login. Default config (claude-desktop-config.json) needs no env at all. All values below are shown at their defaults; OE_MCP_COOKIES_PATH is only used for the legacy OE_MCP_RELAY_TRANSPORT=off cookie read path, the Python collections tooling, and npm run doctor/login/smoke.
